notes: Hand-drafted rubric (Phase A, v1). Required marker IDs reference data/condition_markers_curated.json. The Phase B scorer treats `required_marker_ids` as 'any of these strongly suggests at least this level' and `disqualifying_marker_ids` as 'presence forbids classification at this level or above'. Silent listings (zero markers, ~9% of the sample) default to level 3 unless other structured signals (e.g. listings.condition='Novostavba') override.

building_levels.description: Brand-new build OR documented complete renovation of the whole structure within the last few years. Either an unambiguous claim of novostavba / kompletní rekonstrukce / dům po kompletní rekonstrukci, or a recent dated rekonstrukce 20xx marker. No negative markers may be present.

Building has had substantial structural / envelope modernization but isn't a full rebuild — typically a combination of: insulation, new roof, new façade, replaced risers / electric / water trunks, new lift, panelák revitalisation, heat pump or PV installation. Or an explicit 'velmi dobrý stav' / 'velmi dobrý technický stav' claim. No negative markers.

Building is maintained but has only partial / incremental upgrades, OR the listing is silent on building condition. Examples: plastic windows in the common areas, 'udržovaný dům', 'dobrý stav objektu', or no claim either way. This is the default bucket for listings without explicit positive or negative building-level signals.

Building has an explicit negative claim about technical state: 'před rekonstrukcí', 'v původním stavu', 'ke kompletní rekonstrukci', 'určen k rekonstrukci'. Not yet at the demolition / shell-only extreme.
Demolition candidate, raw shell, or explicit 'špatný stav objektu'. Only assign when the listing makes a near-unambiguous critical-state claim.

apartment_levels.description: Either a brand-new apartment (novostavba) OR an explicitly complete recent renovation of the unit: 'po kompletní rekonstrukci', 'kompletně zrekonstruovaný byt', 'kompletní rekonstrukce bytu', 'po celkové rekonstrukci', 'celková rekonstrukce'. Or a dated 'rok rekonstrukce 20xx' within the last few years. No negative markers.

Unit has been substantially modernized but isn't claimed as a full renovation. Strong signals here: 'po rekonstrukci', new sanitary core (nové jádro / zděné jádro / nové bytové jádro / nové zděné jádro), new bathroom (nová koupelna), new electrical / water / drain trunks, new triple-glazed plastic windows, 'velmi dobrý stav' / 've velmi dobrém stavu'. No negative markers.

Unit has partial / incremental upgrades but no full-renovation claim: a new kitchen line, plastic windows, new floors, partial renovation, modern bathroom features. Also the default bucket for silent listings (no explicit positive or negative apartment-level claim).

Apartment has an explicit negative claim: 'v původním stavu', 'určený k rekonstrukci', 'původní dřevěná okna', 'původní rozvody', 'původní jádro', or no kitchen at all. Not yet at the umakart / shell extreme.
Umakartové jádro (1970s laminated-board sanitary core) is the canonical level-1 trigger. Only assign when an extreme original-state marker is unambiguously claimed.
